patterns.name: service-not-found-with-location
patterns.title: Service $1 (defined at $2) missing from the layer stack
patterns.action: Add $1 to the Layer.provide() chain where the effect runs.
patterns.example: Service not found: UserRepo (defined at src/user.ts:12)

patterns.name: service-not-found
patterns.title: $1 not provided
patterns.action: Provide via Layer.provide($1.Default) or include in Layer.mergeAll(); verify it's defined with Effect.Service.

patterns.name: unhandled-defect
patterns.title: Unhandled defect: $1
patterns.action: A throw escaped the typed error channel. Wrap with Effect.catchAllDefect() or fix the root cause (a throw inside Effect.sync/gen).
patterns.example: A defect was detected: TypeError: x is undefined

patterns.name: circular-layer
patterns.title: Circular layer dependency
patterns.action: Use Layer.provideMerge for shared services, or extract a shared base layer to break the cycle.

patterns.name: rpc-handler-missing
patterns.title: RPC method $1 declared with no handler
patterns.action: Add a handler for $1 in the RPC live layer.

patterns.name: schema-parse
patterns.title: Schema parse failed: expected $1, got $2
patterns.action: Input does not match the schema. Check the input shape against the Schema.

patterns.name: service-constructor-misuse
patterns.title: Effect.Service used incorrectly
patterns.action: Correct form: class S extends Effect.Service<S>()('S', { ... }) {}.
patterns.example: TypeError: Effect.Service is not a constructor

patterns.name: fiber-interrupted
patterns.title: Fiber interrupted (usually normal)
patterns.action: Normal during graceful shutdown/timeout. Only investigate scope/resource management if unexpected.
